name: gemini
limitations: Command flow is contract-based until host-specific hook/runtime wrappers are wired.
Bundle metadata is emitted as generated import bundle metadata in targetRender.gemini.payload; host runtime invocation remains external.
Current non-CLI support is a generated import bundle, not a native marketplace installer.

bundle.importInstructions: Use the release bundle at bundles/gemini/<pack>/ as reusable role, skill, hook, and task guidance.
